creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
This PR can be closed as I sent in a patch to remove the net-p2p/sonarr-devel port from the tree in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=276164
It's not really needed anymore, and all other *arr ports also dont have a -devel version.

Thanks for all the time and effort put into triaging and pushing my updates to this port, and the testing of it.
